13.0:
...Oh my? Has another 
cute little lamb wandered in?
13.1:
Hehehe~ Are you here to seek power from me?
This is a deal with a demon, you know~
13.2:
But unfortunately, it's 'not the time' yet~
It's not time for you to face your fate just yet~
13.3:
Right now, you're still just a lost little lamb~
One who knows nothing and hasn’t realized anything yet~
13.4:
Heyyy~~ Are you sitting there 
hoping to hear my prayers?
13.5:
Too bad♥ I'm a great demon~
I don't do things like that for you~
13.6:
Hee—ey~~ you ♥
You’re giving off an awfully dangerous aura~
13.7:
Impulse, destruction, rampage— Hehe♥
I can tell you’ve been holding it in for a long time, haven’t you?
13.8:
Well~? You’re about to lose control, aren’t you ♥
That restless desire… is it about to spill out of your chest?
13.9:
Even if this place is ruled by a demon—
it’s still a church, you know ♥
13.10:
Come now~ before the sister...
Speak out all your true desires ♥
13.12:
...Oh my?
And what exactly does that mean~?
13.13:
Is that your choice?
Even though you were just gasping under my teasing~
13.14:
That foolish arrogance of yours…
let me crush it deep into the floor ♥
13.15:
Hehe ♥
You can’t hold it back anymore, can you?
13.16:
Come now ♥ show me that unrestrained desire—
I’m very curious to see what you’ll turn into next~
13.17:
Good ♥ yes, that posture…
what a well-behaved little thing you are~ ♥
13.18:
Fully exposed, self-aware of your own inferiority, utterly obedient—
a lost little lamb should always stay just like this ♥
13.19:
Don’t move ♥ don’t even try to resist my power~
Not that you’re capable of it anymore~
13.20:
Aww ♥ what’s wrong with you now?
Your breathing is already a mess and we’ve barely begun?
13.21:
Ah ♥ all that sin in you…
it just keeps pouring out~!
13.22:
In a situation like this,
you can still get excited ♥
13.23:
You’re supposed to be confessing your sins~
but your mind has been completely taken over by desire, hasn’t it? ♥
13.24:
As expected from a naughty child like you~
I’ll just have to punish you with something even harsher ♥
13.25:
Hehe~ ♥
Nothing left to say now, is there~?
13.26:
Your impulses, your anxiety, your gloom…
I’m absorbing all of it ♥
13.27:
You can feel it, can’t you?
your heart growing emptier and emptier~
13.28:
That’s right ♥ the deeper you sink,
the more I can satisfy your craving for salvation~
13.29:
Come now… offer everything to me like a good little one ♥
That is the only reason you exist here, after all ♥♥
13.30:
Just you wait, my little lamb♥
I'm gonna wring every last drop of sin out of you~
13.31:
(M-My body… it won’t obey me…
I can’t move…!)
16.0:
By the sweat of your brow you will eat 
your food until you return to the ground,
since from it you were taken; 
for dust you are and to dust you will return.
16.1:
I have seen all the things that are done under the sun; 
all of them are meaningless, a chasing after the wind.
16.3:
For all have sinned and fall 
short of the glory of God.
16.5:
My guilt has overwhelmed me 
like a burden too heavy to bear.
17.0:
Jesus asked him, "What is your name?"
He replied, "My name is Legion, for we are many."
17.1:
Then another sign appeared in heaven: 
a great red dragon with seven heads and ten horns,
and on its heads were seven crowns. Its tail swept 
a third of the stars from the sky and cast them to the earth
17.2:
O shining one, son of the morning! 
How have you fallen from heaven?
You who once laid nations low, 
how have you been cast down to the earth?
17.3:
And I saw a beast rising out of the sea. 
It had ten horns and seven heads,
with ten crowns on its horns, 
and blasphemous names on its heads.
17.5:
The Lord said to Satan, "Where have you come from?"
Satan answered, "From roaming the earth, 
going back and forth upon it."
18.0:
...It's a teleportation circle.
Leaving this place now…?
